trellis_version.description: Optional. Semver of the canonical core-rules this clone is pinned to. Read by scripts/upgrade.sh.

presets.description: Optional. List of preset rule-layers to load on top of the parent rules. Each entry must match a file under core-rules/presets/<name>.md. Symlinks land at <project>/.claude/rules/preset-<name>.md and <project>/.agents/rules/preset-<name>.md (under Codex). Order is preserved — later entries compose on top of earlier ones.

approved_mcps.description: Optional. Allowlist of MCP server names sanctioned for use across registered projects. Today this is documentation only — projects MAY connect MCPs not listed here. A future audit (mcp-drift) is reserved to warn when a project's .mcp.json references an unapproved server. Names match the server name as exposed to the harness (e.g., the prefix before '__' in mcp__<server>__<tool>). Examples: 'scheduled-tasks' (Trellis audits), 'computer-use', 'claude-in-chrome', 'Vercel', 'Cloudflare', 'obsidian'.

scope.description: 'fleet' = enabled across all registered projects; 'per-project' = only where the project explicitly opts in.

autonomy_default.description: Optional. Fleet default autonomy level (integer 1–5) used by every session under this clone unless overridden. 1=pedagogical, 2=cautious, 3=standard (default), 4=initiative, 5=autonomous. Project-local <project>/.trellis.config.json may override with its own 'autonomy' field. Presets may clamp via 'autonomy_ceiling'.

autonomy.description: Optional. Project-local override of autonomy_default. Same range and semantics. Used only in project-local <project>/.trellis.config.json files, but accepted at fleet-level for symmetry.

package_manager.description: Optional. Default JS package manager for hooks and gates that run project scripts (pre-push, stop-verify, process-gate). 'auto' (the default when unset) = detect from lockfile: pnpm-lock.yaml→pnpm, bun.lock(b)→bun, yarn.lock→yarn, package-lock.json→npm. An explicit value (pnpm|npm|bun|yarn) forces that manager regardless of lockfile. Project-local <project>/.trellis.config.json may override with its own 'package_manager'. With the key unset, resolution is byte-identical to pre-config Trellis (pure lockfile detection) — this key is purely additive.
